## AdminPatternIdReference.reciprocalAttribute property

Attribute on each target that must reference the source element's ID. This models reciprocal relationships such as tab/panel ownership.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly reciprocalAttribute?: 'aria-controls' | 'aria-describedby' | 'aria-labelledby' | 'for';
```
